pilots.name: Inverse Sentiment (demo)
pilots.author: Capital Claw
pilots.description: Contrarian basket inspired by inverse-media trackers — demo holdings, not affiliated with third-party apps.

pilots.name: NASDAQ-10 Growth
pilots.author: Raincheck-style demo
pilots.description: Top growth names — proportional copy into your linked brokerage.

pilots.name: Congressional Disclosure Tracker (demo)
pilots.author: Quiver-style demo
pilots.description: Mirrors a demo disclosure basket — sovereign on-appliance, not live congressional data.

pilots.name: AI World War III (demo)
pilots.author: Thematic Labs demo
pilots.description: AI infrastructure + semiconductor tilt — thematic pilot for agent-led copy trading.

pilots.name: Quant Fund Tracker (demo)
pilots.author: Capital Claw
pilots.description: Demo 13F-style allocation — rebalance on heartbeat when weights drift.

pilots.name: Actively Managed Momentum
pilots.author: InTheMoney-style demo
pilots.description: Signal-driven pilot — agent emits trades; subscribers mirror proportionally.
